cases.title: RbacNegativeMatrix: PermissionGuard denies out-of-scope report:read before ReportService executes against Postgres
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database with ClassAssignment linking Instructor A to HESD-01 / SWE-101 only
Attendance and Closed session data exist for HESD-01/SWE-101 and HESD-02/SWE-102
PermissionGuard wired to roles-permissions matrix per testing-plan §5 RbacNegativeMatrix
steps: Authenticate as Instructor A and invoke GET /reports/summary for unassigned HESD-02 / SWE-102
Assert PermissionGuard returns 403 before ReportService query executes (spy or query counter)
Assert no student roster rows from HESD-02 appear in response body
Repeat for GET /reports/session/:sessionId where session belongs to unassigned class-subject
Assert 100% denial rate for out-of-scope report:read attempts in matrix sample
cases.expected: NFR-11 module boundary: out-of-scope report access denied at permission guard with real DB; ReportService never returns cross-assignment data per BR-08

cases.title: Out-of-scope instructor CSV export denied with ExportDenied security audit per BR-09
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with attendance for HESD-01 / SWE-101 (assigned) and HESD-02 / SWE-102 (unassigned)
Instructor A with ClassAssignment to HESD-01 / SWE-101 only; report:read scoped per API design §8.3
ExportDenied security log table available for denied attempts
steps: POST /reports/export with filter { classCode: HESD-02, subjectCode: SWE-102, from, to } using Instructor A session
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden with errorCode Forbidden or ReportAccessDenied per BR-08 scope
Query security audit log and assert ExportDenied entry with actor instructorAId, timestamp, and denial reason
Assert no CSV file content generated and no ExportAuditLog success row created
Contrast: POST /reports/export for assigned HESD-01 / SWE-101 filters returns HTTP 200 text/csv with ExportAuditLog success
cases.expected: NFR-11 module boundary: instructor in-scope export permitted; out-of-scope export denied with audit per BR-09 and API design §8.3

cases.title: Instructor attendance:write blocked after 24-hour edit window with EditWindowExpired
preconditions: Closed session with closedAt at T0 in Postgres
TestClock fixture controls current time
Instructor assigned to session with attendance:write during Active window
steps: At T0 + 23h invoke PATCH /attendance/:recordId with Instructor session and assert HTTP 200
Advance clock to T0 + 25h
Invoke PATCH /attendance/:recordId with same Instructor session and valid status change
Assert HTTP status 403 and errorCode EditWindowExpired
Query attendance_records and confirm status unchanged from last successful edit
cases.expected: beforeState: instructor edit allowed within 24h; afterState: instructor attendance:write denied per NFR-11 manual edit authorization; HTTP 403 EditWindowExpired

cases.title: TS-31: Assigned instructor report succeeds; unassigned instructor report denied per RBAC matrix
preconditions: Instructor A assigned to HESD-01 / SWE-101; Instructor B not assigned
Closed sessions with attendance exist for HESD-01 / SWE-101
Both instructors authenticated with valid sessions
steps: Instructor A GET /api/v1/reports/summary?classCode=HESD-01&subjectCode=SWE-101&from=2026-06-01&to=2026-06-30 and assert HTTP 200 with roster data
Instructor B GET same URL and assert HTTP 403 ReportAccessDenied
Assert Instructor B response contains no student roster or summary counts
Verify denial message Bạn không có quyền xem báo cáo này per roles-permissions §2.5
cases.expected: NFR-11 scenario-matrix TS-31: scoped report access enforced; assigned 200, unassigned 403 with zero data leakage per AC-12b and BR-08

cases.title: TS-32: Student export denied; instructor scoped export; admin institution-wide export
preconditions: Attendance data exists for HESD-01 / SWE-101 and HESD-02 / SWE-102
Instructor A assigned to HESD-01 / SWE-101 only
Authenticated Student and TrainingOfficeAdmin sessions
steps: Student POST /api/v1/reports/export with filter body and assert HTTP 403 ExportNotAllowed per AC-13b
Instructor A POST /api/v1/reports/export for assigned HESD-01 / SWE-101 and assert HTTP 200 text/csv per AC-13c
Instructor A POST /api/v1/reports/export for unassigned HESD-02 / SWE-102 and assert HTTP 403 Forbidden
TrainingOfficeAdmin POST /api/v1/reports/export with institution-wide filters and assert HTTP 200 text/csv
Query export audit logs: ExportAuditLog success for instructor in-scope and admin exports; ExportDenied for student and instructor out-of-scope per BR-09
cases.expected: NFR-11 scenario-matrix TS-32: student export always denied; instructor export scoped to assignment; admin institution-wide export per AC-13 and BR-09

cases.title: TS-09: Instructor views unassigned class roster returns 403 Forbidden
preconditions: Instructor assigned to HESD-01 only; enrollments exist for HESD-01 and HESD-02
Authenticated Instructor session without roster:read for HESD-02 class-subject
steps: GET /api/v1/enrollments?classId=<HESD-01-id>&subjectId=<SWE-101-id> with Instructor session and assert HTTP 200
GET /api/v1/enrollments?classId=<HESD-02-id>&subjectId=<SWE-102-id> with same session
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden and errorCode Forbidden
Assert response body contains no enrollment rows for unassigned class-subject
cases.expected: NFR-11 cross-class data protection: instructor denied unassigned roster per TS-09; no peer class enrollment data exposed

cases.title: GET /reports/summary by unassigned instructor returns 403 ReportAccessDenied error envelope
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor B not assigned to requested class-subject
Attendance data exists for HESD-01 / SWE-101
steps: GET /api/v1/reports/summary?classCode=HESD-01&subjectCode=SWE-101&from=2026-06-01&to=2026-06-30 with Instructor B session
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert response JSON contains errorCode ReportAccessDenied, message Bạn không có quyền xem báo cáo này, and requestId
Assert response body contains no classCode aggregation or students array with data
cases.expected: HTTP 403 standard error envelope per API design and roles-permissions §2.5; no report payload for out-of-scope instructor

cases.title: POST /reports/export by Student returns 403 ExportNotAllowed error envelope
preconditions: Authenticated Student session (no report:read or report:export per roles-permissions §2.2)
Valid export filter body matching API design §8.3
steps: POST /api/v1/reports/export with JSON filter body using Student session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert response JSON contains errorCode ExportNotAllowed and message Chỉ phòng đào tạo mới có quyền xuất dữ liệu per AC-13b
Assert Content-Type is application/json not text/csv
Verify ExportDenied security audit entry created per BR-09
cases.expected: HTTP 403 ExportNotAllowed contract per API design §8.3; student CSV export always denied per NFR-11 and BR-09

cases.title: GET /reports/summary by Student returns 403 Forbidden — students never receive report:read
preconditions: Authenticated Student session with enrollment history
Attendance report data exists for student's enrolled class-subject
steps: GET /api/v1/reports/summary?classCode=HESD-01&subjectCode=SWE-101&from=2026-06-01&to=2026-06-30 with Student session
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden and errorCode Forbidden
GET /api/v1/reports/session/:sessionId for enrolled session with Student session and assert HTTP 403
Assert no cohort aggregate or peer student data in either response body
cases.expected: NFR-11: Student role denied report:read per roles-permissions §2.2; personal history uses GET /attendance/me/history only per FR-14

cases.title: Student denied user:write on POST /users and GET /users list
preconditions: Authenticated Student session
Valid user create payload prepared per API design
steps: POST /api/v1/users with valid JSON body using Student session and assert HTTP 403 Forbidden
GET /api/v1/users with Student session and assert HTTP 403 Forbidden
Query users table and confirm no new row from Student create attempt
cases.expected: NFR-11 rbac-negative: Student lacks user:write and user:read (all); admin-only user admin per roles-permissions §2.3

cases.title: Instructor denied roster:write, audit:read, and out-of-scope CSV export
preconditions: Instructor A assigned to HESD-01 / SWE-101 only
Valid CSV roster import payload and export filter for unassigned HESD-02 / SWE-102 prepared
steps: POST /api/v1/roster/import with valid CSV multipart using Instructor session and assert HTTP 403 Forbidden
POST /api/v1/reports/export with unassigned HESD-02 / SWE-102 filters using Instructor session and assert HTTP 403 Forbidden
GET /api/v1/audit/logs or audit:read endpoint with Instructor session and assert HTTP 403 Forbidden
Contrast: POST /api/v1/reports/export for assigned HESD-01 / SWE-101 returns HTTP 200 text/csv per API design §8.3
cases.expected: NFR-11 rbac-negative matrix: Instructor denied roster:write, audit:read, and out-of-scope export; in-scope export permitted per BR-09

cases.title: Student denied session management and qr:display permissions
preconditions: Authenticated Student session
Active session with valid QR token exists in database
steps: POST /api/v1/sessions with valid create body using Student session and assert HTTP 403 Forbidden
POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/open using Student session and assert HTTP 403 Forbidden
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/qr/current using Student session and assert HTTP 403 Forbidden
cases.expected: NFR-11: Student has no session:write, session:read (scoped), or qr:display; all session management denied per roles-permissions §2.2

cases.title: Student denied access to another student's attendance record via scoped API
preconditions: Student A and Student B enrolled in same class-subject with distinct attendance records
Authenticated Student A session
steps: Student A attempts GET /api/v1/attendance/:studentBRecordId or equivalent cross-user attendance endpoint
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden or empty self-scoped result with no peer data
Student A GET /api/v1/attendance/me/history and assert only own records returned
Assert no institutionalId or displayName from Student B appears in Student A response
cases.expected: NFR-11 cross-class/peer data protection: Student attendance:read limited to self per AC-14b and roles-permissions §1.3 Self scope

cases.title: Flow D reporting authorization: assigned report/export 200, unassigned 403, admin export 200
preconditions: Instructor A assigned to HESD-01 / SWE-101; Instructor B unassigned
TrainingOfficeAdmin account exists
Closed sessions with attendance for HESD-01 / SWE-101 and HESD-02 / SWE-102
steps: Instructor A GET /api/v1/reports/summary for assigned HESD-01 / SWE-101 and assert HTTP 200 with data
Instructor A GET /api/v1/reports/summary for unassigned HESD-02 / SWE-102 and assert HTTP 403 ReportAccessDenied
Instructor A POST /api/v1/reports/export for assigned HESD-01 / SWE-101 and assert HTTP 200 CSV with ExportAuditLog per AC-13c
Instructor A POST /api/v1/reports/export for unassigned HESD-02 / SWE-102 and assert HTTP 403 Forbidden with ExportDenied audit
TrainingOfficeAdmin POST /api/v1/reports/export with institution-wide filters and assert HTTP 200 CSV with export audit log
cases.expected: NFR-11 Flow D complete: report and export scope enforced — instructor in-scope 200, out-of-scope 403, admin institution-wide export per testing-plan §6 Flow D and AC-12/AC-13

cases.title: Instructor manual edit at 25h post-close returns 403 EditWindowExpired; admin override succeeds
preconditions: Closed session with closedAt at T0; attendance record in Absent status
Instructor assigned to session; TrainingOfficeAdmin account available
TestClock at T0 + 25h
steps: Instructor PATCH /api/v1/attendance/:recordId to Present and assert HTTP 403 EditWindowExpired
Assert message Đã quá thời hạn chỉnh sửa điểm danh (24 giờ) per error-handling §4.2
TrainingOfficeAdmin PATCH same record to Present and assert HTTP 200
Query AttendanceAuditLog and confirm admin edit recorded with actor and timestamps
cases.expected: NFR-11 boundary: instructor attendance:write time window enforced; admin post-24h override allowed per BR-10 and roles-permissions §2.3

cases.title: Repeated denied export attempts by Student each return 403 and produce audit entries
preconditions: Authenticated Student session
Attendance data exists for export filters
steps: Student POST /api/v1/reports/export attempt 1 and assert HTTP 403 ExportNotAllowed
Student POST /api/v1/reports/export attempt 2 with different filter and assert HTTP 403
Query security or export audit log and assert two denied attempt records with distinct timestamps and actor Student userId
Assert no CSV content returned on either attempt
cases.expected: NFR-11 100% denial target: every out-of-scope export attempt rejected with audit log per BR-09 and NFR-11 verification criteria

cases.title: Instructor inline Xuất CSV on /reports for assigned scope; zero /admin/* nav; /admin/export ForbiddenPage
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor assigned to HESD-01 / SWE-101 in browser
Closed sessions with attendance for HESD-01 / SWE-101
Instructor layout renders SidebarNav per UI layout components §6
steps: Navigate to /reports, apply HESD-01 / SWE-101 filters, and verify report table renders
Verify page header or toolbar shows enabled Xuất CSV button per AC-12d and listing-pages §10
Query SidebarNav DOM and assert zero anchor elements with href matching /admin/* anywhere in instructor layout chrome
Verify SidebarNav renders only Buổi học and Báo cáo items per usePermittedNav() — unauthorized items omitted not disabled
Click Xuất CSV and verify scoped CSV download for assigned class-subject per AC-13c
Navigate directly to /admin/export as Instructor and observe ForbiddenPage with title Không có quyền truy cập; no AdminLayout chrome or admin export form rendered
cases.expected: NFR-11 UI scope: instructor inline export on /reports for assigned scope; zero /admin/* nav links per AC-18a and BR-14; /admin/export blocked by route guard

cases.title: Student UI hides admin navigation and blocks direct admin user list URL
preconditions: Authenticated Student session in browser
Admin user management route /admin/users exists
StudentLayout renders BottomNav per UI layout components §5.3
steps: Open student check-in layout and query BottomNav DOM — assert zero anchor elements with href matching /admin/* or /sessions or /reports
Verify BottomNav renders only permitted items (Điểm danh, Lịch sử) — items lacking permission omitted from DOM not disabled per BR-14
Navigate directly to /admin/users URL as Student
Observe ForbiddenPage with title Không có quyền truy cập per AC-18b; user list table and admin chrome not rendered
Verify no user roster data visible in DOM
cases.expected: NFR-11 UI nav negative matrix: student chrome contains zero forbidden-route-prefix links per AC-18b and BR-14; direct admin URL blocked by UI guard

cases.title: Admin inline and /admin/export CSV succeed; instructor scoped /reports export; student /reports ForbiddenPage
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin authenticated with report data on /admin/reports
Instructor assigned to HESD-01 / SWE-101 with attendance data on /reports
Student authenticated session available
steps: As TrainingOfficeAdmin on /admin/reports with filters applied, click inline Xuất CSV and verify CSV downloads without navigating to /admin/export per AC-13d
As TrainingOfficeAdmin on /admin/export open confirm dialog, submit export, and verify institution-wide CSV download per AC-13a
As Instructor on /reports with assigned filters click Xuất CSV and verify scoped CSV download per AC-13c
As Student navigate to /reports and observe ForbiddenPage with title Không có quyền truy cập — no Báo cáo report shell or Xuất CSV control per AC-13b and BR-14
Verify no CSV download initiated for Student on any export surface or API attempt
cases.expected: NFR-11 UI enforcement: admin inline export on /admin/reports and /admin/export both permitted; instructor scoped inline export on /reports; student blocked at /reports with no export chrome per BR-09 and AC-13

cases.title: RbacNegativeMatrix integration sweep: each role denied all empty-matrix permission endpoints
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with seeded fixtures for sessions, reports, and users
Test matrix enumerates denied (role, permission, route) tuples from roles-permissions §2.2
Authenticated sessions for Student, Instructor, and TrainingOfficeAdmin
steps: For Student role, call each endpoint requiring permissions denied in §2.2 (session:write, report:read, report:export, user:write, roster:write, policy:write, audit:read) and assert HTTP 403

For Instructor role, call denied endpoints (user:write, roster:write, policy:write, audit:read, checkin:submit, out-of-scope POST /reports/export) and assert HTTP 403; confirm in-scope POST /reports/export for assigned class-subject returns HTTP 200
For TrainingOfficeAdmin, call denied endpoints (checkin:submit, qr:display) and assert HTTP 403
Compute denial rate across full matrix sample and assert equals 100%
cases.expected: NFR-11 verification criterion met: RBAC negative test matrix per role denies 100% of out-of-scope access attempts; instructor in-scope export permitted per BR-09 per testing-plan §5 RbacNegativeMatrix

cases.title: TS-21f: Instructor layout chrome audit — zero /admin/* href values in SidebarNav and hub
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor session with report:read for at least one class-subject
Instructor lands on /sessions with InstructorLayout rendered
steps: On /sessions inspect SidebarNav, TopBar, and RoleHomeHub card links
Assert document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="/admin"]') count is zero across entire instructor layout chrome
Verify RoleHomeHub shows Tạo buổi học mới and Báo cáo links per AC-18d with no admin hub cards
Open mobile drawer (< md breakpoint) and repeat href audit — zero /admin/* links in drawer nav
Navigate to /reports and confirm SidebarNav still omits all admin-only routes from roles-permissions §2.3a
cases.expected: NFR-11 scenario-matrix TS-21f: instructor UI nav negative matrix satisfied — zero forbidden route-prefix links in chrome per AC-18a, BR-14, and NFR-11 verification criteria

cases.title: SidebarNav and BottomNav omit unauthorized items from DOM — not disabled or hidden via CSS
preconditions: Authenticated Student and Instructor sessions available in separate browser contexts
usePermittedNav() wired per roles-permissions §2.3a and UI layout components §5.3, §6.2
steps: As Student on /check-in count BottomNav list items — expect exactly permitted entries (Điểm danh, Lịch sử); assert no display:none or aria-disabled on omitted admin/instructor routes
As Student verify no SidebarNav element exists in StudentLayout
As Instructor on /sessions count SidebarNav items — expect Buổi học and Báo cáo only; assert Người dùng, Xuất CSV, and other admin nav labels absent from DOM
As Instructor verify BottomNav is not rendered in InstructorLayout
As TrainingOfficeAdmin on /admin verify SidebarNav includes admin items and zero student-only /check-in nav in admin chrome
cases.expected: NFR-11 component nav enforcement: SidebarNav and BottomNav filter via usePermittedNav(); unauthorized destinations omitted from DOM per BR-14 — showing forbidden nav items is a spec violation

cases.title: POST /reports/export by assigned Instructor returns 200 text/csv with scoped rows
preconditions: Instructor A assigned to HESD-01 / SWE-101 via ClassAssignment
Closed sessions with attendance exist for HESD-01 / SWE-101 in June 2026
Authenticated Instructor A session
steps: POST /api/v1/reports/export with body { classCode: HESD-01, subjectCode: SWE-101, from: 2026-06-01, to: 2026-06-30 } using Instructor A session
Assert HTTP status 200 OK
Assert Content-Type text/csv; charset=utf-8 and Content-Disposition attachment filename per API design §8.3
Assert CSV header contains institutional_id, display_name, class_code, subject_code, session_date, attendance_status, checked_in_at
Assert all CSV data rows are scoped to HESD-01 / SWE-101 only
Query ExportAuditLog and assert success entry with actor instructorAId per AC-13c
cases.expected: HTTP 200 instructor scoped CSV export contract per API design §8.3 and NFR-11 instructor assignment boundary; audit-logged per BR-09
